hero.headline: Unlock more features
hero.subtext: SGI's core features are <1>free</1>, and <3>always will be</3>. PRO exists purely for users who wish to support the ongoing development of SGI — the extra features are our way of saying <5>thank you</5> for your support.

adFree.title: Ad-Free Experience
adFree.description: Use SGI without any advertisements for a completely clean, distraction-free interface.

themes.title: Exclusive Themes
themes.description: Customize SGI with 6 unique themes available only to PRO subscribers.

liveSupport.title: Real-Time Live Support
liveSupport.description: Skip the queue — chat directly with the developer via the in-app help desk and get support in real time.

multiAccount.title: Multi-Account Support
multiAccount.description: Sign in and manage multiple Steam accounts at the same time.

autoFarmCards.title: Automatic Card Farming
autoFarmCards.description: SGI monitors your library and automatically starts farming any game that still has card drops remaining.

gamesList.title: Automatic Games List Updates
gamesList.description: Your games list refreshes automatically every 15 minutes as you add and play games.

multipleUnlockerGames.title: Unlock Achievements For Multiple Games
multipleUnlockerGames.description: Unlock achievements for several games at the same time in Achievement Unlocker instead of one at a time.

freeGames.title: Free Game Redemption
freeGames.description: Automatically redeem free games on Steam the moment they become available — never miss a freebie.

sellDupes.title: Sell Duplicate Items
sellDupes.description: Easily list all duplicate inventory items for sale with a single click.

subscriptionNotActivated.q: I purchased PRO but my subscription is not activated?
subscriptionNotActivated.a: After checking out, you will receive an email containing your license key. Open the app, go to Settings → Subscription, paste your license key into the input field, and click Activate. If you are still experiencing issues, contact us via the help desk at the top-right of the app or at contact@steamgameidler.com.

transferDevice.q: How do I transfer my license key to a new device?
transferDevice.a: Your license key is tied to one device at a time. To transfer it, open the app on your new device, go to Settings → Subscription, enter your license key, and click Activate. A prompt will ask you to confirm the transfer. Once confirmed, your new device is active and the previous device loses access on its next launch. If you reinstalled the app on the same machine, no transfer is needed — your device is recognised by its hardware ID.

cancel.q: How do I cancel my subscription?
cancel.a: Go to Settings → Subscription → Manage Subscription, and follow the cancellation prompts. After cancellation, you will retain access to PRO benefits until the end of your current billing period.

switchTier.a: Yes. Cancel your current subscription then re-subscribe to your desired tier following the standard subscription process.

invoices.q: Where can I find invoices and receipts?
invoices.a: You'll receive an email receipt after subscribing. For full billing history, go to Settings → Subscription → Manage Subscription.

refund.a: PRO subscriptions are treated as donations and are generally non-refundable. Refunds are considered on a case-by-case basis. Contact us via the help desk at the top-right of the app or at contact@steamgameidler.com.

chargeback.q: What happens if I file a chargeback?
chargeback.a: Fraudulent chargebacks significantly impact this small independent project. Filing one without prior communication may result in your access to this app being permanently revoked. If there was a billing error, we are always happy to work with you to get it sorted as fast as possible, so please contact us via the help desk at the top-right of the app or at contact@steamgameidler.com.

modal.footer: Prices displayed are in USD and exclude taxes and currency conversion fees which may apply depending on your location and payment method.

listSelected.title: List {{count}} selected items?
listSelected.description: This will list every selected item at its entered price. Estimated time: {{time}}. Leave the app running until the process is complete.

sellAll.description: This will fetch a market price for and list up to {{count}} items currently shown, using your inventory settings' price preference and sell limits. Estimated time: {{time}}. Leave the app running until the process is complete.

sellDupes.title: Sell duplicate items?
sellDupes.description: This will fetch a market price for and list up to {{count}} duplicate items (keeping one copy of each), using your inventory settings' price preference and sell limits. Estimated time: {{time}}. Leave the app running until the process is complete.

removeListings.description: This will cancel every active market listing for this account. Estimated time: {{time}}. Leave the app running until the process is complete.

gameSettings.title: Game Settings
gameSettings.maxPlaytimeScopeNote: Applies everywhere a game can be idled - manual and automatic idling, achievement unlocker, and card farming.
gameSettings.idlingScopeNote: Only applies to manually and automatically idled games - card farming and achievement unlocker have their own separate caps below.
gameSettings.cardFarmingScopeNote: Only applies to card farming sessions.

globalMaxPlaytime.label: Max playtime (all games)
globalMaxPlaytime.description: Automatically stop a game, and remove it from queues, once its total playtime reaches this many minutes.

maxPlaytime.label: Max playtime
maxPlaytime.description: Automatically stop this game, and remove it from queues, once its total playtime reaches this many minutes. Overrides the value above, if set.

globalMaxIdleTime.description: Automatically stop idling after this many minutes.

globalMaxCardFarmingTime.description: Automatically stop card farming a game after this many minutes.

maxCardFarmingTime.description: Automatically stop card farming this game after this many minutes. Overrides the value above, if set.

maxCardDrops.label: Max card drops
maxCardDrops.description: Stop farming this game once this many drops have been farmed this session.

maxAchievementUnlocks.label: Max achievement unlocks
maxAchievementUnlocks.description: Stop the achievement unlocker on this game after unlocking this many achievements.

gameSettings.filterCustomized: Only show games with custom settings

errors.generic: Something went wrong updating your game settings. Please try again. ({{code}})

logs.description: The app's most recent log lines, refreshed automatically.

resetSettings.confirmDescription: Resets your Steam Web API key override and, if you're signed in, this account's achievement unlocker, inventory manager, card farming, and free games settings back to their defaults. Your signed-in accounts stay signed in.

clearData.confirmDescription: Signs every account out, stops any running automation, clears logs, and clears locally-stored app data on this device (recent searches, inventory locks, etc.). This can't be undone.
